summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of DawaLink B2B Marketplace new features completed. All features requested are working correctly: Supplier orders management (5 tabs), Pharmacy orders page with rating, Stock management, Excel import with AI mode, Cart and checkout functionality.
passed_tests: Landing page loads correctly with DawaDzLink branding
Supplier login (supplier1@pharmaplus.dz / supplier123) - SUCCESS
Supplier Dashboard - 5 tabs visible: Produits, Commandes, Gestion Stock, Agents, Stats
Supplier Commandes tab - orders list with stats (Total: 8, En attente: 3, Confirmées: 2, Livrées: 3)
Supplier orders - 'Confirmer' and 'Marquer livrée' buttons working
Supplier orders - View details (eye icon) button available
Supplier orders - Search and filter functionality present
Supplier Gestion Stock tab - Stats display (10 products, 2 low stock, 0 expiring soon, 2 out of stock, 442,000 DZD total value)
Supplier stock management modal - Movement types (Entrée, Sortie, Définir)
Excel Import Modal - AI mode with description 'L'IA détectera automatiquement vos colonnes'
Excel Import Modal - Template mode with download template option
Excel Import Modal - File upload area with drag-and-drop support
Pharmacy login (pharmacy1@madina.dz / pharmacy123) - SUCCESS
Pharmacy Dashboard - Header buttons: Mon Stock, Commandes, Cart
Pharmacy Dashboard - Product catalog displays 19 products
Pharmacy Commandes page - Orders history with stats (Total: 9, En attente: 4, Confirmées: 2, Livrées: 3)
Pharmacy Commandes - View details and Annuler buttons
Pharmacy Rating Modal - 5-star rating with optional title and comment
Pharmacy Rating Modal - 'Envoyer' submit button
Pharmacy Product Detail Modal - Price, UG, DCI, Category, Supplier info
Pharmacy Product Detail Modal - Commercial agents with Phone, Email, WhatsApp
Cart functionality - Add to cart working
Cart Modal - Items grouped by supplier with quantity controls
Cart Modal - Subtotal and Total display
Checkout - Payment methods: Paiement à la livraison (active), BaridiMob (disabled), CCP (disabled)
Checkout - Notes field and order summary
Checkout - 'Confirmer la commande' button
critical_code_review_comments: All requested features are properly implemented and functional
UI components have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Order status workflow is correctly implemented (pending -> confirmed -> delivered)

success_rate.backend: N/A - Backend testing not requested (already tested via curl)

seed_data_creation: Database pre-seeded with orders, products, users - Orders visible in both supplier and pharmacy views
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: 1) Supplier has 5 tabs (Produits, Commandes, Gestion Stock, Agents, Stats), 2) Pharmacy has Commandes button in header showing order history with rating capability, 3) Excel import supports AI mode and Template mode, 4) Cart and checkout fully functional with payment methods. Test data includes 8-9 orders in various statuses across suppliers.

supplier_orders_tab.details: Orders list with stats, Confirmer/Marquer livrée buttons, search and filter, view details modal

supplier_stock_management.details: 5 stats cards, stock table with actions, stock management modal with Entrée/Sortie/Définir modes

excel_import.details: AI Import mode with auto-detect columns, Template mode with download option, file upload with drag-drop

pharmacy_orders_page.details: Orders history with stats, view details, cancel pending orders, rate delivered orders

rating_modal.details: 5-star rating, optional title and comment fields, Annuler/Envoyer buttons

cart_functionality.details: Add to cart, quantity controls, grouped by supplier, clear cart, checkout flow

checkout.details: Payment methods (delivery, BaridiMob disabled, CCP disabled), notes, order summary, confirm button
